name: AI Governance & Compliance Review
description: Comprehensive AI governance review — classifies AI use cases under the EU AI Act, identifies prohibited and high-risk systems, assesses vendor AI tools, and produces a gap register with remediation roadmap.
promptTemplate: Conduct an AI governance and compliance review for {{company}}. Scope: {{ai_description}}. Classify each AI use case under the EU AI Act (prohibited / high-risk / limited risk / minimal risk). For high-risk systems, identify conformity assessment requirements. Assess compliance with applicable regulations including {{regulations}}. Produce a gap register with severity ratings and a prioritised remediation roadmap.

substitutions.ai_description: all AI systems used internally and in customer-facing products
substitutions.regulations: EU AI Act, GDPR Article 22, and applicable sector guidance
